questions.q: Who was the original voice actor for Star Fox 64's Wolf O'Donnell and Bill Grey, whose passing was widely reported in the gaming community on April 15, 2026?
On April 14, 2026, Disney quietly delisted 15 of its classic titles, including older Star Wars games, from which digital PC storefront?
What is the name of the new PvP-free starter region introduced to EVE Online in April 2026 to help new players safely learn the basics of the game?
In April 2026, the largest shareholder of which legendary shoot 'em up developer offered $600k of her own funds to help the studio pivot to console game development?
On April 14, 2026, THQ Nordic announced release dates for the PlayStation and Xbox ports of which classic RPG trilogy?
